capabilities_used.evidence: 他反复把布林带极度收口当成主 setup。例: [2025-01-31] “#XRP is coiling up again. The last time Bollinger Bands got this tight, we saw a 500% breakout.”；[2024-10-31] “#XRP's Bollinger Bands at record tightness – breakout is near!”；附图 #4 也是典型的收口后扩张叙事。
[2025-01-31] “#XRP bull flags everywhere. The breakout is inevitable.”；[2024-03-31] “The ongoing $MYRO bull flag breakout on the daily timeframe is progressing as anticipated.” 说明他经常把旗形延续当作上涨中继。
[2025-02-27] “#XRP DOUBLE BOTTOM 🔥 Teleport it back to $4,00 ASAP!”；其语言直接把 W 底视为强反转启动信号。
他默认把强势品种视作趋势延续而非均值回归。例: [2024-11-30] “#XRP in a straight line to $30+” ；[2025-06-30] “#XRP CAN’T STOP PUMPING !!!!” ；[2025-01-31] “This #XRP breakout is FAR from over!”
附图 #6 明确画出 1-2-3-4-5 波浪结构，并把当前整理视为通往第 5 浪的中继；[2025-08-31] “The final wave for #XRP 👇” 也说明他会用 Elliott wave 做趋势投射。
[2025-03-31] “$3.40 IS LOADED WITH SHORTS! #XRP COULD RIP THROUGH IF BULLS STEP IN. THE SQUEEZE ZONE IS ACTIVE.” 这是典型把密集空头止损区/清算区当价格磁铁的衍生品思路。
[2025-02-28] “CONGRATS! YOU SURVIVED ANOTHER #XRP BEAR TRAP! THE FEB 3RD LOW WILL NOT BE BROKEN.”；[2025-02-27] “IF YOU SOLD YOUR #XRP ON THE RETEST...” 体现他常把下杀视为扫流动性/诱空。
[2025-03-31] “Global liquidity has bottomed out. #XRP REVERSAL INCOMING!”；[2025-04-30] “THE MONEY PRINTER WILL GO BRRRRRRRRRRR.. #XRP WILL 10-30X IN 2025” 说明他会用全球流动性与宽松叙事做方向确认。
[2025-11-30] “TRUMP IS NOW URGING THE FED TO CUT RATES BY 3–4 POINTS DOWN TO 1%.” 他明显把降息/宽松预期解释为风险资产利多，虽然表达更偏内容驱动而非系统宏观框架。
[2025-11-30] “$XRP JUST SAW $243.95M IN NET ETF INFLOWS THIS WEEK, THE LARGEST YET.”；[2025-03-31] “ETF PPROVALS?” 说明他会把 ETF 审批/资金流当价格催化剂。
[2026-02-28] “Long-term $XRP holders increased their 30-day accumulation from 47M → 145M XRP.” 他会使用长期持有者增持来强化多头叙事。
虽不如 TA 高频，但他多次强调制度资金/链上资金入口扩张，如 [2026-03-31] “open $10 TRILLION in 401(k) retirement money to crypto” 与稳定币收益规则谈判，核心逻辑都是新增购买力将流入加密。
[2024-02-29] “For the first time ever, $JASMY has surpassed the EMA ribbons on the weekly chart.” 他会用均线带收复/站上均线来确认趋势切换。
他频繁把回踩失败解释为假跌破而非结构损坏。例: [2025-02-28] “bear trap” 与 [2025-02-27] “Bullish market structure still intact for #XRP” 的组合，就是典型 trap 叙事。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Multi-Year Compression Breakout
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Identify long-duration triangle or compression structures on weekly/monthly charts and project outsized targets once price escapes the range.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 识别周线/月线持续数年收敛压缩结构，一旦脱离压缩区，就按结构高度投射远距离目标。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 附图 #3 画出 2018-2025 的大型收敛结构并把目标直接投射到 33.21925；[2024-11-30] “#Xrp has broken out of its compression zone, signaling the start of a potentially parabolic rally.”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Regulatory Catalyst Breakout
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use pending legal, SEC, banking, ETF, or market-structure decisions as directional catalysts that can unlock repricing in specific tokens.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把诉讼进展、SEC 动作、银行接入、ETF、市场结构法案等监管/制度事件视为代币重定价触发器。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2025-03-31] “SEC’S APRIL 3 CLOSED SESSION COULD DELIVER MAJOR #XRP DECISIONS.”；[2025-03-31] “THE CASE IS OVER. #XRP IS FREE TO SCALE IN THE U.S.”；[2026-04-08] “CLARITY Act is a ‘done deal’...”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Elliott Wave 5 Extension Targeting
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 艾略特第 5 浪延伸投射
new_capabilities_proposed.description: After a visible 1-2-3-4 sequence, anticipate a terminal or explosive wave-5 expansion and use it for high-upside projections.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 在清晰 1-2-3-4 结构后，预判终段或加速型第 5 浪，并据此做高弹性上方目标投射。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 附图 #6 直接标注 1-2-3-4-5，并把当前横盘解释为通往第 5 浪前的整理；[2025-08-31] “The final wave for #XRP 👇”

personal_quirks.quote: Only future #XRP millionaires can like this post.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 用身份认同和财富预期绑定持仓者，把持有 XRP 叙事化为“未来富人俱乐部”。

personal_quirks.quote: IF YOU SELL YOUR #XRP NOW YOU DON'T DESERVE GETTING RICH
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 把卖出定义为意志不坚定或失去资格，强化持币不动的信仰型框架。

personal_quirks.quote: The 2017 #XRP bull run had 3 brutal shakeouts—yet it still did 110,000%. Dips don’t end bull runs, they fuel them.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 把回撤解读为牛市内部清洗而不是趋势终结，鼓励在强叙事周期中忽略中途波动。

personal_quirks.quote: Global liquidity has bottomed out. #XRP REVERSAL INCOMING! 🚀
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 用宏观流动性拐点为单一代币提供顺风确认，即便交易核心仍是山寨币多头表达。

personal_quirks.quote: #XRP bull flags everywhere. The breakout is inevitable.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 一旦结构与叙事共振，就直接把突破视为高确定性事件，而不是条件概率事件。

unique_traits: 他不是典型纪律型交易员，更像“XRP 超级多头内容交易员”：用极强情绪动员、制度利好 headlines 和简单高辨识度 TA 图形共同驱动观点。其分析框架以周线/月线大级别压缩、布林带收口、旗形和波浪投射为主，几乎所有信号都服务于同一个长期看多叙事。与一般 TA 交易员不同，他很少讨论失效条件和风险回撤，更擅长把监管、银行接入、ETF、供应冲击等新闻包装成价格即将重估的证据链。
